content: Remote OK Freelance Background Artist for YouTube Studio Newscape Studios inc. <strong>Job Summary<br><br></strong>Newscape Studios, Inc has a dozen YouTube channels, with over 10 million total subscribers. We create content based on popular video games such as Fortnite, Minecraft, and original animations. Newscape also produces a vast array of videos for a young audience and content through animation and machinima.<br><br>We are looking to add Freelance 2D Background artists to our team to work on our animation. Candidates must have substantial knowledge using Adobe Creative Suite, particularly Photoshop. Toon Boom knowledge is a plus but not required.<br><br>Animation channels to match style of:<br><br>https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCToxKVrkEuAONR4rFIJ_DyQ<br><br>Responsibilities and Duties:<br><br><ul><li>Keep an organized and efficient workflow</li><li>Fully finalize environments and background props for full use in production</li><li>Meet daily quotas during the production week </li><li>Responsible for approximately 25 environments per week</li><li>Depending on skill and experience some duties and responsibilities may differ<br><br></li></ul>Qualifications and Skills:<br><br><ul><li>Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Procreate</li><li>Illustrator/Background artists must be able to adapt to a variety of styles</li><li>Strong understanding of composition, perspective, color theory, light and form is a must</li><li>Must be able to work as part of a team</li><li>Communicates effectively</li><li>Great listening skills</li><li>Great time management skills</li><li>Comfortable in meeting deadlines and daily quotas</li><li>Strong attention to detail and consistency <br><br></li></ul>Competitive pay: $800.00 per production week<br><br>Portfolio is required to be considered.<br><br>This is a remote/ work from home, Independent Contractor Position.<br><br><strong>Artists With LLCs Are Preferred But Not Required.<br><br></strong>If you receive an email from Newscapeprocareers.com this is a scam. Newscape Studios will not email questionnaires, ask for any personal information such as SS #, address, or bank account information or present a job offer without a face to face interview with our supervisors and/or Human Resources. If you receive an email from newscapeprocareers.com, please report to the authorities. A valid U.S. Driver's License required; applicants must pass an MVR (Motor Vehicle Record) screening.</p><p>People Management Responsibilities: No</p><p>Role Type: Full-Time</p><p>Salary Range: $60,000 - $65,000 plus incentives</p><strong>Position Overview<br><br></strong><p>As the Territory Sales Manager, you'll be at the forefront of regional retail sales execution, representing the CELSIUSÂ® brand across Grocery, Convenience, and Food Service channels. This is your opportunity to drive sales performance, cultivate strong distributor partnerships, and amplify brand presence in a high-energy, field-based role. You'll bring a results-driven mindset, a passion for customer engagement, and a deep understanding of CPG sales execution to every store visitâtypically 12 to 15 per day.<br><br></p><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li><strong>Experience:</strong> 1+ years in consumer goods sales, preferably in beverage, distributor sales, or related industries</li><li><strong> Education:</strong> High school diploma or equivalent required</li><li> Valid U.S. Driver's License and ability to pass an MVR screening</li><li> Strong business acumen with an entrepreneurial mindset</li><li> Comfortable with daily face-to-face customer interaction</li><li> Excellent verbal and written communication skills</li><li> Ability to deliver presentations and engage large peer groups</li><li> Familiarity with CRM tools and field sales reporting systems <br></li></ul><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong><ul><li>Drive Celsius "perfect store" execution, expanding SKU distribution, shelf space, displays, and promotional activity</li><li>Execute brand strategy across retail locations within assigned territory</li><li>Conduct account audits, track opportunities, and deliver insights via CRM application</li><li>Collaborate with distributor partners through route rides, blitzes, and key account calls</li><li>Support regional sales initiatives as directed by District or Regional Sales Manager</li><li>Participate in weekly sales calls to review performance and outline goals</li><li>Achieve and report on daily, weekly, and quarterly KPIs<br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong><ul><l
